$comment: Neutral demo seed for a fresh Casals deployment. Uploads the catalog templates to the file-registry, authorizes them, and creates a single demo section with a playground desk. Idempotent: re-running skips anything that already exists.

sections.name: Demo
sections.description: Neutral demo section for trying out Casals.

desks.name: Playground
desks.description: Scratch space for creating demo stands from the catalog templates.
